meta.title: Te Pā Systems Observatory
meta.subtitle: 12 leverage points · Aotearoa NZ political economy
meta.source_note: All series are cached from public NZ government sources. See docs/LEVERAGE_POINTS.md.
meta.kaupapa: Built under the Māori Data Governance Model of Te Kāhui Raraunga. Public, aggregated, non-personal data only.

leverage_points.name: Official Cash Rate
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Whose cost of living moves when the number moves?

leverage_points.name: New dwelling consents (monthly, seasonally adjusted)
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Are our buffers thick enough to survive a shock, or optimised for extraction?
leverage_points.notes: Wired via GH Actions when STATSNZ_API_KEY is set (Aotearoa Data Explorer, SDMX 2.1).

leverage_points.name: Greenhouse-gas emissions, gross (annual)
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Does the physical economy match ecological limits?
leverage_points.notes: Annual release; fetcher pulls the latest table when ADE key present.

leverage_points.name: OIA responses within statutory timeframe (%)
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Does the state react at the speed the system actually moves?

leverage_points.name: Trade union membership rate
leverage_points.source_name: Stats NZ HLFS · MBIE registered unions
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Can workers correct their own conditions, or has the loop been cut?

leverage_points.name: Household net worth — top 1% share
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Which snowballs faster — capital compounding, or wages?

leverage_points.name: OIA complaints upheld by Ombudsman (annual)
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Who gets to know what, and when?

leverage_points.name: People receiving Jobseeker Support
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Whose behaviour do the rules discipline?

leverage_points.name: Active iwi / hapū co-governance arrangements
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Who is allowed to redesign the system from inside?

leverage_points.name: Wellbeing-Budget priority spend ÷ GDP-growth spend
leverage_points.paradigm_question: What is the system actually optimising for?

leverage_points.name: Hansard framing ratio: "growth" ÷ ("wellbeing" + "tino rangatiratanga")
leverage_points.paradigm_question: What is thinkable in this political culture?
leverage_points.notes: Computed by the Gradio Space via Hansard full-text search; refreshed weekly.

leverage_points.name: Waitangi Tribunal reports released (annual)
leverage_points.paradigm_question: Can the system see beyond itself?
